text: I feel a curious blend of gratitude and detachment—hearing repeated thank yous, I sense the close of a talk or presentation, the polite rituals of social exchange echoing through slick modern architecture. The visible emphasis on research and development, the exhibit's bold colors and sharp lines, contrast with the slightly clinical atmosphere. I am both an observer and a participant, welcomed by words of thanks, yet slightly on the outside, pondering the drive for progress and human connection that permeates these spaces.
